questions.question: Which of the following is true with respect to Network Virtualization?

options.a: It abstracts the virtual network on a physical network
options.b: It abstracts the physical network on a virtual network
options.c: It is essentially a collection of physical SDN routers
options.d: Network virtualization is a non-existent concept.

questions.explanation: Network Virtualization abstracts physical resources from network services, effectively abstracting a virtual network on top of a physical network[cite: 1715, 1716, 1719].

questions.question: For rule placement at the edge with respect to Software Defined IoT, which of the following is a critical issue that is required to be addressed?

options.c: Mobility of end users and nodes

questions.explanation: In SD-IoT, a critical challenge at the access layer is that users are typically mobile in nature, creating a highly dynamic network that requires frequent changes in rule placement[cite: 1730, 1731, 1734].

questions.question: Which cloud service model allows users to deploy and control their own software, including operating systems, while the provider manages the infrastructure?
questions.explanation: Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS) provides the facility to access computing resources where users can deploy, execute, and control any software, including operating systems[cite: 1742, 1743, 1744].

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS)?

options.b: Requires users to manage the virtual machines
options.d: Simplifies development by abstracting the infrastructure

questions.explanation: PaaS removes the need for organizations to manage underlying infrastructure like hardware and operating systems, allowing them to focus solely on application deployment[cite: 1757, 1762].

questions.question: Which essential characteristic of cloud computing refers to the ability of resources to be scaled up or down automatically?
questions.explanation: Rapid elasticity allows for the dynamic allocation and release of resources to facilitate scale-out and scale-in automatically[cite: 1772, 1774, 1777].

questions.question: An organization A wants to deploy a cloud infrastructure where certain private data is on-premise and accessible only by authenticated members, while the rest is in a global cloud. Which deployment model should be used?
questions.explanation: A Hybrid Cloud is a set-up constructed of two or more unique cloud set-ups (such as private and public) pooled together[cite: 1785, 1787, 1793].

questions.question: A Private Cloud deployment model cannot provide laaS but can provide PaaS.
questions.explanation: Security of cloud infrastructure must be assured for both public and private clouds across all service models: SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS[cite: 1800, 1801, 1806].

questions.question: What is the primary function of a Light Virtual Access Point (LVAP) in the ODN architecture for SDN-based loT?

options.a: Acts as a firewall between user devices and access points
options.b: Enables virtualization of Wi-Fi APs for per-client network control
options.c: Encrypts user traffic before forwarding to the cloud
options.d: Controls routing at the backbone of the network

questions.explanation: In the Odin architecture, an LVAP is assigned to clients to manage virtualization and respond to frames for fine-grained control[cite: 1821, 1834, 1835].

questions.question: With respect to Virtualization, if one VM runs on a hypervisor, another VM is unable to use the hypervisor.
questions.explanation: Virtualization allows one computer host to appear as many computers (VMs), sharing the same physical resource pool simultaneously[cite: 2140, 2142, 2144, 1842].

questions.question: Through which cloud service model do you use an image editing application without explicitly installing it on your local system?
questions.explanation: Software as a Service (SaaS) delivers applications over the internet, allowing use without local installation[cite: 1852].

questions.question: Which of the following best defines 'measured service' in cloud computing?

options.a: Cloud resources are billed only annually
options.b: Users must request reports manually for resource usage
options.c: Cloud systems automatically control and optimize resources based on metering

questions.explanation: Measured service involves recording and monitoring resource usage to dynamically control and optimize resources transparently[cite: 1858, 1859, 1860, 1861].

questions.question: With respect to Cloud security, which of the following is expected to have a higher level of security in a generic sense?
questions.explanation: In a comparison of cloud types, the security level for a Public Cloud is generally considered low while a Private Cloud is considered high[cite: 1872, 1874].

questions.question: Data security and client authentication is an issue in which of the following cloud service models?
questions.explanation: Infrastructure security building levels, including application and network security, apply across SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS models[cite: 1801, 1802, 1881].

questions.question: In cloud computing, the users have specific knowledge about the exact physical location of the computing hardware.
questions.explanation: A key characteristic of cloud computing is that resources are abstracted and pooled, often leaving the user with no specific knowledge of the exact hardware location[cite: 1888].

questions.question: GreenCloud implementation focuses most on which of the following aspects?
questions.explanation: GreenCloud monitors and focuses on the energy consumption of data centers (servers, switches, etc.) to reduce operational expenses[cite: 1896, 1901, 1902].
